Discover our selection of specialty coffees.
Selected with intention, roasted to perfection.
Shop Now
A Passion For Coffee
Since 2019, Café Clément has been roasting premium specialty coffee in Marietta, Ga. Guided by a palate and passion for sweet flavorful coffee, we fuse modern roasting techniques with coffees that are grown and processed carefully. This combination allows you to taste the unique flavors of coffee from around the world without any unnecessary roasty or bitter flavors. To achieve optimal flavor we buy and serve coffees seasonally ensuring you always have a fresh and unique experience.
Quality
Green Coffee
The roasted coffee you drink can only be as good as its starting point. We work diligently to find coffee producers, exporters, and importers that value high quality coffee. Every detail of the growing, harvesting, processing, storage, and shipping is micromanaged to maximize the flavor potential. This chaotic but precisely calculated work ensures that the green coffee we buy and the roasted coffee you drink is of the highest standards.
The Café
Come visit us at our Marietta Café
1438 Canton Rd Marietta, Ga 30066
Monday-Friday 7:00AM-3:30PM Saturday 8:00AM-3:30PM
Sunday - Closed
Check out the menu -
www.cafeclement.com/menu
Classique Espresso
Shop Now
Joie de vivre
“The joy of life”
Subscribe and Save
Shop Now
A Family Affair
Café Clément is a small family business with a passion for serving good coffee and food. Luisana was born in the Dominican Republic and came to America when she was only 5 years old. Coming from a Hispanic family, food was always the center of everything. Her mother influenced her love for food greatly and from a young age she knew cooking was a passion.  Arthur’s parents moved to the United States from France and started their own bakery shortly after he was born. The bakery is where Arthur fell in love with making espresso and seeing guests enjoy an intentionally crafted beverage. Ever since then he has been obsessed with all things coffee. His love and passion for making coffee that people enjoy is what inspired him to start Café Clément.
Arthur Beaudet              Founder
Luisana Rojas Beaudet Founder

meta.meta_description:
We are a coffee roastery that specializes in sourcing high quality coffees 
and working with the same producers every year creating a more consistent 
and sustainable coffee buying experience. We roast weekly, offering 
espresso blends, single-origin coffees, subscriptions, and more.
